description_long: This house is a two-story structure surrounded by dense greenery and trees, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The exterior features a mix of stone and modern cladding, with a prominent gable roof section and a flat-roofed extension. The front includes a driveway with a parked car, a small porch with steps, and a landscaped garden area. The rear of the house has a rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and planters, as well as large windows that allow natural light to flood the interior. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and a bay window at the front. The overall design blends traditional and modern architectural elements, creating a visually appealing and functional urban residence.
description: A two-story house with stone and modern cladding, surrounded by trees, featuring a gable roof, flat-roofed extension, rooftop terrace, and a landscaped driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entryway with steps, bay window, and dense tree coverage around the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, stone facade, and the lush greenery enveloping the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed extension, rooftop terrace with seating, and large modern windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and a mix of traditional and modern architectural features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, small porch, bay window, and stone detailing
